text.title: Reranking — Failure Modes
text.summary: Five antipatterns when adding a reranker to a RAG pipeline.

failure-mode.description: Skipping the reranker on Advanced+ tier — top-20 raw chunks dumped into synthesis context, precision tanks.
failure-mode.detector: tier ≥ "advanced" in rag-pipeline.yaml AND reranker block absent OR provider == "none"
failure-mode.repair: Add Cohere Rerank or BGE Reranker. Retrieve top-20, rerank to top-5. Verify p95 latency budget still met.

failure-mode.description: Oversize top-N — top_n_input set to 5000 hoping for better recall. Cohere truncates at 1000; queries lose docs silently.
failure-mode.detector: provider == "cohere" AND top_n_input > 1000; OR top_n_input > provider cap
failure-mode.repair: Pin top_n_input ≤ provider cap. Use multi-stage rerank (rerank in batches, fuse) only if >1000 candidates truly needed; usually they aren't.

failure-mode.description: Adopting reranker without an eval — assume Cohere will improve quality. Cost incurred, latency added, no measurable lift.
failure-mode.detector: reranker shipped without eval_evidence; OR sample_size < 50; OR precision_lift < 0.10
failure-mode.repair: Build 50-100 labelled eval set; measure precision@K with and without reranker. Adopt only if lift ≥ 10%.

failure-mode.description: Hard-coded provider — managed reranker outage takes down RAG. No fallback path.
failure-mode.detector: fallback.strategy == "hard-fail" OR missing; production logs show RAG 5xx during reranker provider incident
failure-mode.repair: Implement fallback: (a) local BGE-reranker on standby OR (b) return first-stage top-K with degraded flag. Test fallback with synthetic 5xx pre-prod.

failure-mode.description: No latency budget — reranker latency drifts; p95 doubles month-over-month without anyone noticing.
failure-mode.detector: latency_budget_ms missing OR no Prometheus rule on reranker p95
failure-mode.repair: Pin latency_budget_ms in reranker.yaml. Wire alert when p95 > budget × 1.2. Reduce top_n or switch provider on breach.
